description: Log4Shell: Apache Log4j2 JNDI lookup allows remote code execution. Attacker sends crafted log message to trigger arbitrary code execution on servers using Log4j.
remediation: Update Log4j to 2.17.1+ (Java 8), 2.12.4+ (Java 7), or 2.3.2+ (Java 6). Remove JndiLookup class: zip -q -d log4j-core-*.jar org/apache/logging/log4j/core/lookup/JndiLookup.class

description: CVE-2021-45046: Log4j2 JNDI lookup pattern allows crafted data to cause denial of service and remote code execution in non-default configurations.
remediation: Update Log4j to 2.17.1+. Set log4j2.formatMsgNoLookups=true as workaround.

description: Heartbleed: OpenSSL TLS heartbeat extension allows attackers to read memory contents, potentially exposing private keys, passwords, and session tokens.
remediation: Update OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later. Revoke and reissue SSL certificates after patching.

description: EternalBlue (MS17-010): Windows SMBv1 remote code execution vulnerability. Exploited by WannaCry and NotPetya ransomware. Critical risk for legacy Windows HMIs.
remediation: Apply MS17-010 patch. Disable SMBv1: Set-SmbServerConfiguration -EnableSMB1Protocol $false. Block TCP 445 at network perimeter.

description: BlueKeep (CVE-2019-0708): Pre-authentication RCE in Windows RDP. Wormable — can spread without user interaction. Affects Windows 7, XP, Server 2008 R2.
remediation: Apply KB4499175 (Win7) or KB4499180 (Server 2008 R2). Enable NLA. Block port 3389 externally. Disable RDP on HMIs if not required.

description: WinCC SCADA SQL injection: Siemens WinCC OA allows unauthenticated SQL injection via the web interface, potentially allowing full database compromise.
remediation: Apply Siemens Security Advisory SSA-168644. Update WinCC to 7.5+. Enable Windows Authentication mode. Restrict web interface access.

description: FactoryTalk Services Platform authentication bypass: Allows unauthenticated remote access to HMI services via crafted requests to the directory service.
remediation: Apply Rockwell patch PN1538. Implement network segmentation. Restrict directory service to trusted IP ranges only.

description: Modicon M340 PLC firmware authentication bypass allows unauthenticated reading/writing of PLC memory, potentially causing process disruption or safety failures.
remediation: Apply Schneider firmware update. Enable authentication on Modbus/TCP. Implement Modbus firewall to restrict write commands.

description: CVE-2021-29921: Python ipaddress module improper input validation allows bypass of IP address filtering controls.
remediation: Update Python to 3.9.7+ or 3.10.0+. Validate IP addresses using additional checks in application code.

description: ProxyShell (CVE-2021-34473): Microsoft Exchange pre-auth RCE via URL normalization. Allows unauthenticated arbitrary code execution as SYSTEM.
remediation: Apply CU21 for Exchange 2016 or CU11 for Exchange 2019. Apply KB5001779. Restrict EWS access.

description: CVE-2021-39863: Buffer overflow in Adobe Acrobat Reader allows arbitrary code execution via maliciously crafted PDF files. Common supply-chain attack vector.
remediation: Update to Adobe Acrobat Reader 2021.007.20099 or later. Enable Protected Mode. Block JavaScript in PDFs in enterprise settings.

description: CVE-2018-20250: WinRAR ACE arbitrary file write vulnerability. Crafted archive extracts malicious files to Windows Startup folder for persistence.
remediation: Update WinRAR to 5.71+. Block ACE file extraction via Group Policy. Consider using 7-Zip instead.

description: CVE-2022-29072: 7-Zip privilege escalation via heap overflow in 7-Zip Help window. Allows local privilege escalation to SYSTEM.
remediation: Update 7-Zip to 22.00 or later.

description: Multiple Java 8 RCE vulnerabilities exploitable via deserialization. Java is commonly installed as dependency of SCADA/HMI software.
remediation: Update Java 8 to 8u321 or later. Apply quarterly Oracle CPU updates. Disable Java browser plugin.

description: CVE-2020-13699: TeamViewer authentication bypass via custom URI handler allows man-in-the-middle attacks during VPN sessions. Remote access tools on OT machines are high risk.
remediation: Update TeamViewer to 15.18+. Restrict TeamViewer to approved remote IT sessions only. Remove from HMIs if not required.

description: CVE-2022-41975: RealVNC Server privilege escalation on Windows allows local attacker to gain SYSTEM-level access. VNC commonly deployed on plant HMIs.
remediation: Update RealVNC to 6.11.0+. Require VNC authentication. Restrict VNC access to trusted IP ranges only.

description: Multiple IE11 memory corruption vulnerabilities. Internet Explorer 11 reached end-of-life June 2022 but remains common on legacy HMI/SCADA workstations.
remediation: Migrate to Microsoft Edge. For HMIs requiring IE-only interfaces, use IE Mode in Edge. Apply all available security patches.

description: AVEVA/Wonderware InTouch HMI stack buffer overflow via malformed .CAB project files allows code execution in the context of the InTouch process.
remediation: Apply AVEVA Security Bulletin LFSEC00000138. Update InTouch to 2020 R2 SP1 or later.

description: CVE-2023-48795: Terrapin attack against PuTTY SSH client allows prefix truncation of SSH handshake, weakening connection security.
remediation: Update PuTTY to 0.80+.

description: CVE-2023-40031: Notepad++ heap buffer write exploit via crafted file allows arbitrary code execution. Notepad++ commonly used by engineers on HMI workstations.
remediation: Update Notepad++ to 8.5.2 or later.
